revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}} {{{oclc|}}} | 
{{#if: {{{id|}}}
  | [https://www.worldcat.org/identities/{{{2|{{{id}}}}}}/ {{{1|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}]
  | [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/{{{2|{{{oclc}}}}}} {{{1|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}]
}} in libraries ([[WorldCat]] catalog)}}<!--
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using worldCat with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:WorldCat]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=y| 1 | 2 | id | name | oclc }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:

}}|preview=Page using [[Template:WorldCat]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=y| 1 | 2 | id | name | oclc }}<!-- --></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

{{#if: {{{id|}}}
  | [https://www.worldcat.org/identities/{{{id}}}/ {{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}]
  | [https://search.worldcat.org/en/title/{{{oclc}}} {{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}} {{{oclc|}}} | {{#if: {{{id|}}} | [https://www.worldcat.org/identities/{{{id}}}/ {{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}] | [https://search.worldcat.org/en/title/{{{oclc}}} {{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}] }} in libraries ([[WorldCat]] catalog)}}<!-- -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:WorldCat]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=y| id | name | oclc }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=|showblankpositional=y| 1 | 2 }}<!-- --></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages using WorldCat with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Pages using worldCat with unknown parameters|_VALUE_${{NAMESPACENUMBER}}:{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]

{{#if: {{{id|}}}
  | [https://www.worldcat.org/identities/{{{id}}}/ {{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}]
